message:
Inline the TLS test dependency

Pass trustme directly to uvx and uv tool run instead of carrying a one-line requirements file for the integration test fixtures.

Assisted-by: ChatGPT (pi)

files.patch:
@@ -629,8 +629,8 @@ def run_container_test(
 
         test_cmd = (
             'export PATH="/opt/tenzir/bin:/root/.local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:$PATH" '
-            "&& uvx --with-requirements /src/tenzir/test/requirements.txt "
-            f"tenzir-test --root /src/tenzir/{test_root} {test_pattern}"
+            f"&& uvx --with trustme tenzir-test --root /src/tenzir/{test_root} "
+            f"{test_pattern}"
         )
         result = subprocess.run(
             ["docker", "exec"] + env_args + [container_name, "bash", "-c", test_cmd],

@@ -448,7 +448,7 @@ RUN XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp \
     TENZIR_NODE_BINARY="$PREFIX/bin/tenzir-node" \
     "${PREFIX}/libexec/uv" tool run \
     --python ">=3.12" \
-    --with-requirements test/requirements.txt \
+    --with trustme \
     tenzir-test \
     --root test \
     -j $(nproc) && \
